title: etlingera metriocheilos var. grandiflora
intro: Etlingera metriocheilos var. grandiflora, also known as the "Lan Rong" or "Golden Torch Ginger", is a tropical plant species belonging to the Zingiberaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Etlingera metriocheilos var. grandiflora include relieving digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
